dimensions.label: Noise pressure
dimensions.question: How strongly does this source increase operator review burden, false positives, or low-value signal churn?

dimensions.label: Duplication burden
dimensions.question: How much of this source's output is already covered by higher-trust or lower-cost sources?

dimensions.label: Maintenance cost
dimensions.question: How much operator or engineering burden does this source impose through auth churn, instability, or breakage risk?

dimensions.label: Operator value retention
dimensions.question: If this source were downgraded or deprecated, how much operator value would still be preserved by the remaining source set?

dimensions.label: Safe actionability
dimensions.question: Can a bounded recommendation be made without auto-removing an active production source or hiding a real coverage gap?

operatorExpectations.activeSourceGuardrail: Active production sources may receive recommendation-only outputs such as retain, human-review, downgrade-review, or deprecate-review. Agents must not auto-remove or disable them.
